description: Implement user registration, login, token refresh, and role-aware authorization
notes: Acceptance: user auth flow works and unauthorized requests are rejected. Dependencies: I001, I003.
evidence: Migrated backend to Go; auth endpoints implemented and verified by go test (internal/server).
steps: Create account and credential model with secure password handling
Implement access token and refresh token flow
Enforce role checks on protected endpoints

description: Implement product category, SPU or SKU, price, stock, and shelf status APIs
notes: Acceptance: storefront can fetch product data and hidden products are excluded. Dependencies: A001, I002.
evidence: Go catalog endpoints implemented (public/admin) and verified by go test (internal/server).
steps: Define product schema and lifecycle states
Provide read APIs for list and detail view
Provide admin write APIs for publish and unpublish

description: Implement cart add, update, remove, and cart query APIs for authenticated users
notes: Acceptance: cart reflects latest valid items and quantities. Dependencies: A001, A002.
evidence: Go购物车接口（增删改查/汇总）已实现，go test ./... 通过。
steps: Create per-user cart item model and constraints
Implement quantity and stock consistency checks
Expose cart summary endpoint for web checkout

description: Implement checkout pricing API including shipping and discount extension points
notes: Acceptance: same input returns same total and breakdown. Dependencies: A003.
evidence: Go结算试算接口已实现（含运费/优惠扩展与确定性trace_id），go test ./... 通过。
steps: Build order preview request and response contract
Calculate item subtotal, freight, and total amount
Return deterministic pricing result with trace id

description: Implement order creation and lifecycle transitions with state machine validation
notes: Acceptance: invalid transitions are blocked and timed close is executed. Dependencies: A004, I004.
evidence: Go订单创建/状态机/超时关单接口已实现，go test ./... 通过。
steps: Create order and order item persistence models
Implement transitions for pending, paid, shipped, done, and canceled
Add timeout close behavior for unpaid orders

description: Integrate one payment provider with callback signature check and idempotent update logic
notes: Acceptance: duplicate callback does not duplicate state update. Dependencies: A005, I003, I004.
evidence: 支付单创建、回调签名验签与幂等处理已实现，go test ./... 通过。
steps: Create payment order record and status fields
Handle callback verification and replay-safe processing
Emit payment success or failure events for downstream

description: Implement shipment, logistics tracking, and refund workflow APIs
notes: Acceptance: paid order can be shipped and refund flow can be tracked. Dependencies: A005, A006.
steps: Add shipment creation and tracking number model
Expose order tracking and delivery confirmation APIs
Provide refund request and refund status APIs

description: Implement notification triggers and operation audit log for core order lifecycle events
notes: Acceptance: each core transaction produces traceable audit records. Dependencies: A005, A006, I004, I006.
steps: Publish notification events for order, payment, shipment, and refund
Store actor and action audit trail for key mutations
Provide query endpoint for operation tracing
